General.Name: NetDragon Websoft Inc
General.Description: NetDragon Websoft Holdings Limited provides online and mobile games the People's Republic of China, the United States, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company's games for kids include JumpStart, School of Dragons, Neopets, World of Madagascar, and Math Blaster; and other games comprise Eudemons Online, Conquer Online, Way of the Five, Conquer Online and Adventure Navigation, and other games. It also licenses and services developed games; sells education hardware and software products. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
General.Address: No.58, Wenquan Branch Road, Fuzhou, China, 350001
